coastal.title: Missing Vancouver actor now believed to be victim of a homicide
coastal.description: In a release, Squamish RCMP said that on May 18, officers received a missing person report for Stewart McLean, who had not been seen since May 15.

kamloops.title: Memorial Cup arrival sparks hockey fever in Kelowna
kamloops.description: Businesses throughout downtown Kelowna are also ramping up preparations as Memorial Cup displays pop up across the city ahead of the tournament.
